metadata.description: Sulis AI plugin marketplace — methodology studios, requirements analysis, facilitation, context cartography, right-sized architecture, disciplined change primitives, deterministic code intelligence, founder coordination, and autonomous Work Package execution end-to-end. v1.14.1 ships sulis-execution v0.10.1 — wpx-* CLI tool discoverability fix. Before this release, the executor agent and run-all / run-wp skills invoked wpx-* tools via the relative path `plugins/sulis-execution/scripts/wpx-NAME ...`, which resolved correctly only when the cwd was the marketplace repo. From a downstream project (where the plugin is installed via the Claude Code marketplace, scripts living at ~/.claude/plugins/cache/sulis-ai-agents/sulis-execution/<version>/scripts/), every wpx-* invocation failed with `no such file or directory`. v0.10.1 fixes this by adding a path-resolution preamble to every agent + skill prompt (find under ~/.claude/plugins/cache, sort by version, capture as $WPX_DIR, dev-fallback to marketplace repo cwd) and ships a `wpx` human-convenience wrapper users symlink to PATH for ad-hoc manual use (debug, recovery, exploration). All v0.10.0 capabilities preserved (Step 1.5 plan generation), all v0.9.0 capabilities preserved (three-layer architecture). Composes with git-workflow-standard.md (GIT-01..GIT-11), executor-loop-standard.md (EL-01..EL-08), red-green-blue.md (RGB-01..03), CP-01..CP-05, AAF-01..AAF-09, EP-02/03/07.

plugins.name: srd
plugins.description: Requirements Analyst — facilitates building Software Requirements Documents backed by UML artifacts through guided conversation. Includes intent triage (Phase 1), disambiguation sweep (Phase 3.5), and adversarial sweep (Phase 3.6 — produces MISUSE_CASES.md with negative requirements). v1.18.1 ships git-workflow-standard.md v0.1.3 — two clarifications from WP-7 first-live-run gaps: GIT-04 new MUST subsection 'CI must run on feature branches' (with example trigger config covering Conventional Commits prefix globs) + new SHOULD subsection 'Local pre-commit fallback' for transitional projects (with explicit guard-rails: journal record, recommendation surfaced to founder); GIT-05 new anti-pattern subsection 'git switch dev from a worktree' — explicit canonical merge paths (host API preferred for all cases, refspec push acceptable shortcut for single-commit branches only, multi-commit must use host API). Composes with executor-loop-standard.md (EL-01..EL-08). v1.18.0 prior: GIT-04 concurrency + GIT-05 rebase + GIT-10 rollback-during-parallel + NEW GIT-11 hot-fix path.

plugins.name: sulis-context
plugins.description: Context Cartographer — discovers existing architecture documentation, ADRs, conventions, and standards in a project; produces .context/{project}/INDEX.md so downstream plugins (SRD, SEA, sulis-security) respect prior decisions instead of restating them. Folder-structure-agnostic; works on any project shape.

plugins.name: sulis-strategy
plugins.description: Business strategy studio — vision, strategy, principles, commercial, GTM, roadmap, and domain-specific research

plugins.name: sulis-product-development
plugins.description: Product development studio — design, plan, implement, complete, feature lifecycle, validation, and autonomous sub-agents

plugins.name: sulis-builder
plugins.description: Studio builder — create new domain expertise packages (7-file studio bundles) using the studio-creation sequence

plugins.name: sulis-design
plugins.description: Design studio — design language, tokens, visual identity, customer experience, and cross-outcome coherence verification

plugins.name: sulis-platform-sdk
plugins.description: Platform SDK — build production-ready SaaS backends with built-in auth, billing, multi-tenancy, and observability

plugins.name: sea
plugins.description: Senior Engineering Architect — designs hardened architectures, audits brownfield code for primitive gaps, and decomposes designs into atomic Work Packages with Red-Green-Blue verification. /sea:probe v0.9.0 runs 17 deterministic phases via ast-grep + lizard + scc + git plus optional tools (jscpd, ts-prune, vulture, deadcode, dependency-cruiser, import-linter, detect-secrets). Polyglot 4-stage workspace enumeration discovers TS, Python, Go, Rust, Terraform, and deployment-only dirs alongside monorepo manifests. Phase 1.16 (Deployment Topology) catalogues Dockerfiles, K8s manifests, Helm charts, Terraform, GitHub Actions, Argo CD, Flux, and Sulis manifests (Workload/Application/BusinessManifest) with secret-reference extraction (NAMES only). Phase 1.17 (Credential Scanning) invokes detect-secrets with a strict hash-only privacy contract — plaintext never appears in any output — and respects .secrets.baseline for new-vs-known triage. Outputs structured JSON + Markdown + self-contained navigable HTML. Tools auto-install via the bundled installer; no LLM fallback. Every WP carries a change primitive (22-primitive Minto-pyramid catalogue). Enforces No-Band-Aid-Wrappers (MUST). Reads .context/{project}/INDEX.md (sulis-context); computes SIZING.md (sFPC + ASR). Consumes SRD v1.11.0+ MISUSE_CASES.md, GLOSSARY.md, ## Deferred to SEA journal sections, and HANDOFF_TO_SEA.md.

plugins.name: sulis-security
plugins.description: Security & Viability Reviewer — runs a 25-primitive codebase viability assessment (security, data protection, code quality, supply chain, infrastructure) via an OODA-spiral methodology. Composes with SEA for hardening and SRD for requirements-traceable findings.

plugins.name: idc
plugins.description: Investor Deck Coach — facilitates Sequoia-style pitch deck creation through guided one-question-at-a-time conversation. Stage-aware (angel, pre-seed, seed, Series A, Series B). Produces evidence-backed market research with tiered sources, stage-appropriate financial modelling (Excel + branded HTML dashboard), adversarial investor-objection review, customer-branded PowerPoint + HTML decks (Reveal.js), and a live rehearsal drill.

plugins.name: sulis-execution
plugins.description: Work Package Executor — three-layer architecture (v0.9.0) plus plan-mode-style Step 1.5 plan generation (v0.10.0) plus wpx-* tool discoverability fix (v0.10.1). v0.10.1 closes the gap where wpx-* CLI invocations from downstream projects failed with `no such file or directory`: every executor / run-all / run-wp prompt now begins with a path-resolution preamble that finds the scripts in the Claude Code plugin cache (~/.claude/plugins/cache/sulis-ai-agents/sulis-execution/<version>/scripts/) via `find ... | sort -r | head -1` and captures the directory as $WPX_DIR for every subsequent invocation; dev-fallback to the marketplace repo cwd when the cache is empty. Ships a new `wpx` human-convenience wrapper that users symlink to ~/.local/bin/wpx for ad-hoc manual use — same resolution logic, lets humans run `wpx journal read --wp WP-7 --project <slug> --field plan` from any project directory. All v0.10.0 capabilities preserved (Step 1.5 plan generation via wpx-journal seed-plan, mark-plan-item, add-plan-item; scope-guard at plan time; resume semantics from the journal). All v0.9.0 capabilities preserved (deterministic Layer 1 tools, executor as Steps 1-7, calling session as Steps 8-12 via wpx-pipeline background Bash). Composes with git-workflow-standard v0.1.3, CP-01..CP-05, AAF-01..AAF-09, EP-02/03/07, RGB-01..03.

plugins.name: sulis-concierge
plugins.description: Founder Concierge — the **VP of Engineering** for non-technical founders building a product through the Sulis AI marketplace. Owns the 7-phase journey (Greet → Discover → Specify → Design → Implement → Verify → Secure), directs specialist agents (SRD, SEA, sulis-context, sulis-execution, sulis-security), reads their produced artifacts, translates output into plain English. v0.1.5 updates Phase 5 to invoke the `/sulis-execution:run-all` skill (which runs the dispatch loop inline) rather than spawning a separate orchestrator subagent — fixes the agent-tree-depth issue observed when subagents try to spawn further subagents. v0.1.4 added Phase 5 slice-end auto-draft WP review (companion to sulis-execution findings-register flow): concierge reads each finding's plain-English summary, presents in AAF-06 three-list shape, walks founder through disposition (schedule / skip / merge into existing). v0.1.3 spawn pattern; v0.1.2 Decision Discipline; v0.1.1 Brevity Discipline.
